stemHtml: Which statement is correct regarding a windmilling propeller on a multi-engine aeroplane?

options.a: A windmilling propeller hardly affects low speed controllability.
options.b: The windmilling drag is only significant at negative blade angles.
options.c: The drag of a windmilling and a feathered propeller is almost the same.
options.d: The windmilling drag is much higher than for a feathered propeller.
